composition_notes: Player positioned left-of-center in urgent reaching pose toward altar-right where tools form descending diagonal (A→B→C), creating visual flow from player to treasure choices. Tools arranged in cascading right-side cluster to simulate altar surface layout while maintaining readability. Slight rotations add organic tension matching 'last-second grab' urgency.
rationale: Mission text demands split-second choice under pressure ('השומרים כבר נשמעים ברקע'). Player at 28% left creates asymmetric tension, leaving right 2/3 for the altar treasures arranged in accessible diagonal. The descending A→B→C pattern (35%→48%→62% y-axis) mimics items resting on sloped altar surface while keeping each ≥15% canvas width for Hebrew label legibility. Player faces right into decision space, not toward exit—freezing the dramatic instant before the grab-and-run.
